title: GPU时代的终结？
description: 去GPU化的浪潮势不可挡！
titleZh: GPU时代的终结？
titleEn: The End of the GPU Era? Silicon Valley Giants Mass "Defection", NVIDIA's $150 Billion Frenzied Self-Rescue
descriptionZh: 去GPU化的浪潮势不可挡！
descriptionEn: The wave of de-GPU-ification is unstoppable! OpenAI finds NVIDIA too slow, Anthropic invests $148.6 billion to embrace TPUs, forcing Jensen Huang to spend $20 billion to acquire the "defector" in a desperate self-rescue move. Now, the computing arms race has officially entered a new era where energy efficiency reigns supreme: whoever first masters the limit of "per joule per microsecond" may become the next decade's dominant force.
